title: Ender's Insanity [TARDIS Refined]
description: A Doctor Who modpack centered around the TARDIS Refined Mod. And enhancing its experience
body:
Ender's Insanity is a series of modpacks where i make a pack centered around a certain mod

# Main Mod: TARDIS Refined
An interesting take on a Doctor Who mod, which makes heavy use of multiblock crafting and a skill tree upgraded through gaining flight experience.

Heres a link to the mods [wiki: https://wiki.tardisrefined.net/the-tardis.html](https://wiki.tardisrefined.net/the-tardis.html)

This pack is aimed to be more Vanilla+ leaning and doesn't add any over the top tech mods. for that you should check out one of my other packs!

_I'm doing this for fun, support will likely be minimal._
